steps.title: Set the function equal to output
steps.content:
The function is $f(x)=5\sqrt{x}$, and the desired output is $45$:
$$5\sqrt{x}=45$$

steps.title: Square both sides
steps.content:
Square both sides to solve for $x$:
$$x=9^2=81$$

steps.title: Select the matching value
steps.content: The value of $x$ is $81$. The answer is D.
